reasoning: Meta's Llama 4 smaller variants reportedly 'underdelivered', and its flagship model ('Behemoth') has faced delays into late 2025 due to engineers questioning whether the performance gains justified a launch. Even if Meta manages to release a new flagship model by December 31, 2025, it would have to surpass established models from Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI on the Chatbot Arena, which takes time for Elo ratings to stabilize. Additionally, in the event of a tie, Meta would lose to Anthropic and Google alphabetically. Given these hurdles and the reported struggles with Llama 4's performance leap, the probability of Meta securing the top spot by the end of the year is quite low.
batch_queries: Will Meta have the top AI model on December 31?
